channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Google is reportedly considering working with SpaceX on orbital data centers
item.description: The company has been working on the idea since the end of 2025.

item.title: Protect your enterprise now from the Shai-Hulud worm and npm vulnerability in 6 actionable steps
item.description: Any development environment that installed or imported one of the 172 compromised npm or PyPI packages published since May 11 should be treated as potentially compromised. On affected developer workstations, the worm harvests credentials from over 100 file paths: AWS keys, SSH private keys, npm tokens, GitHub PATs, HashiCorp Vault tokens, Kubernetes service accounts, Docker configs, shell history, and cryptocurrency wallets. For the first time in a TeamPCP campaign, it targets password managers including 1Password and Bitwarden, according to SecurityWeek. It steals Claude and Kiro AI agent con...

item.title: Perceptron Mk1 shocks with highly performant video analysis AI model 80-90% cheaper than Anthropic, OpenAI & Google
item.description: AI that can see and understand what's happening in a video — especially a live feed — is understandably an attractive product to lots of enterprises and organizations. Beyond acting as a security "watchdog" over sites and facilities, such an AI model could also be used to clip out the most exciting parts of marketing videos and repurpose them for social, identify inconsistencies and gaffs in videos and flag them for removal, and identify body language and actions of participants in controlled studies or candidates applying for new roles. While there are some AI models that offer this type of f...

item.title: Kevin Hartz’s A* just closed its third fund with $450 million
item.description: Early-stage venture firm A* Capital just took the wraps off its $450 million Fund III.

item.title: Waymo recalls nearly 4,000 robotaxis after a car drove directly into a flooded road
item.description: The company has deployed an OTA software fix.

item.title: Apple acquired another company that could help build out its Creator Studio subscription
item.description: The company behind color grading tool Color.io was acquired in January.

item.title: This devious Android malware has returned disguised as TikTok or streaming apps — and is now using blockchain to remain undetected
item.description: A fake TikTok app is actually a banking trojan enabling credential theft and wire fraud.

item.title: Former Tesla exec and Heron Power CEO Drew Baglino has founded a heat pump startup
item.description: Sadi Thermal Machines is Drew Baglino's second startup since leaving Tesla in 2024.

item.title: A growing list of snacks are being recalled over Salmonella fears: Toss these products sold at Target and elsewhere
item.description: Popcorn, nuts pork rinds, potato chips, and cheese curds are among the treats linked to ingredients produced by California Dairies that may be contaminated. More than three dozen snack products sold under numerous brand names are being recalled due to fears that one of their ingredients could be contaminated with the potentially deadly bacterium Salmonella. Here’s what you need to know about the snacks recall....

item.title: Inflation surges to 3.8% in April as the war in Iran spikes gas and food prices
item.description: Gasoline prices are up more than 28% compared with a year ago. U.S. consumer prices climbed sharply again last month as the 10-week war with Iran delivered higher gasoline prices and more pain for Americans.

item.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
item.description: OpenAI's CEO recalls a "particularly hair-raising" conversation with the SpaceX founder.

item.title: Threads users are pissed they can't block Meta's new AI chatbot
item.description: It's the top trending topic on the platform.

item.title: I'm a homes expert, and the Argos sale is crammed with appliance gems — here's what I'd buy
item.description: I've combed through Argos' big appliance sale and hand-picked the best bargains, on brands like Miele and Shark.

item.title: Adobe Premiere arrive sur Android cet été avec une petite surprise signée Samsung
item.description: Pendant l'Android Show 2026 ce mardi 12 mai, Google a confirmé l'arrivée d'Adobe Premiere sur Android pour l'été. Avec, en filigrane, un coup de pouce appuyé au codec APV de Samsung.

item.title: What is the release date for Hacks season 5 episode 8 on HBO Max?
item.description: Being delulu over Deborah and Ava's fake romance is so last week. But when does Hacks season 5 episode 8 drop on HBO Max?

item.title: PlayStation gamers could get a share of $8 million in a class action settlement — here’s how to know if you’re eligible, and why you shouldn’t expect a big payout
item.description: Sony is paying out a share of almost $8 million to PlayStation owners in the US as part of a settlement.

item.title: Spotify is down for some users
item.description: The service confirmed issues on X.

item.title: Panasonic's L10 camera honors 25 years of Lumix
item.description: It offers a new multi-aspect ratio feature and up to 5.6K 60 fps video.

item.title: Android Show 2026 de Google : le récap des « plus grosses mises à jour Android de tous les temps »
item.description: Google a présenté beaucoup de choses pendant l'Android Show 2026 que nous avons commenté ici en direct. Entre Android 17, Gboard, Android Auto, les nouveaux émojis ou encore les Googlebook, voici les infos à retenir.

item.title: 'We’re aware of some issues right now' — live updates as Spotify confirms outage, with thousands of users reporting that they can't access the music streaming service
item.description: Spotify is currently experiencing problems. Here's what we know

item.title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
item.description: The company named Open Doors Partners, Unicorns Exchange, Pachamama Capital, Lionheart Ventures, Hiive, Forge Global, Sydecar and Upmarket as companies that are not authorized to provide access to buy or sell its shares.

item.title: Sam Altman says Elon Musk’s mind games were damaging OpenAI
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says Elon Musk did "huge damage" to the culture of the AI startup. During testimony as part of Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, Altman said Musk required OpenAI president Greg Brockman and former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever to rank researchers by their accomplishments and "take a chainsaw through a bunch." Altman conceded […]

item.title: Potholes cost cities millions: This company is using AI and trucks to fix them
item.description: Fleet management company Samsara has developed an AI model to detect different kinds of potholes and gauge how fast they're deteriorating.

item.title: Avec Create My Widget, Gemini va fabriquer vos widgets Android à la demande
item.description: Lors de The Android Show, Google a dévoilé Create My Widget, un outil qui génère un widget Android à partir d'une simple phrase.

item.title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
item.description: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

item.title: eBay rejects GameStop offer: neither credible nor attractive
item.description: eBay has rejected GameStop's unsolicited offer to buy its company.

item.title: Mac users beware — scammers are hijacking Claude chats and Google ads to push malware
item.description: Fake Claude support pages are circulating, being advertised through Google Ads

item.title: Vous allez percer sur TikTok grâce à votre smartphone Pixel
item.description: Présentée à l'Android Show, la fonction Screen Reactions permet de se filmer en selfie par-dessus l'enregistrement de l'écran du smartphone. Le but est de reproduire facilement un format super utilisé sur TikTok.

item.title: Pourquoi Google veut mettre fin à la 2G et la 3G sur smartphone avec Android 17
item.description: Au détour de ses annonces pour renforcer la sécurité sur Android, Google annonce qu'il va proposer aux opérateurs de désactiver la 2G.

item.title: Android Auto gets a massive AI-powered upgrade with YouTube, Dolby Atmos, and immersive 3D Maps
item.description: Android Auto gets a premium new look, the ability to watch videos, and better integrated Gemini

item.title: Google et Revolut ont un plan pour nous protéger des arnaques téléphoniques
item.description: Les appels malveillants sont de plus en plus nombreux sur nos smartphones, partout dans le monde. Google a une nouvelle stratégie pour protéger les appareils sous Android.

item.title: Android Auto : Google lance la plus grande refonte de son histoire, voici tout ce qui change
item.description: Lors de l'Android Show I/O Edition du 12 mai, Google a présenté la plus grosse refonte d'Android Auto depuis ses débuts. Nouvelle interface adaptative, vidéo en haute définition à l'arrêt, Dolby Atmos et surtout Gemini déjà présent dans 250 millions de véhicules. Mais attention, tout n'arrivera pas en même temps, ni dans toutes les voitures.

item.title: Everything announced at The Android Show: I/O 2026 edition
item.description: Google had a whole lot of news to share, including on new laptops and Gemini Intelligence.

item.title: Voici Rambler sur Gboard : comment Gemini transforme votre dictée hésitante en message propre
item.description: Google glisse une nouvelle fonction baptisée Rambler dans le clavier Gboard pour transformer un monologue hésitant (avec plein de « euh ») en message lisible. Cette nouveauté, Rambler, a été présentée à l'Android Show 2026.

item.title: Ultra HDR, mode nuit… Instagram sur Android veut en finir avec 15 ans de mauvaise réputation
item.description: Google et Meta veulent en finir pour de bon avec les photos et vidéos Instagram au mauvais rendu quand on les enregistre directement depuis l'application sur Android.

item.title: Découvrez les nouveaux émojis de Google pour Android, place au relief !
item.description: Google a dévoilé Noto 3D, sa nouvelle collection d'émojis en relief pour Android. Les Pixel les recevront en premier dans le courant de l'année 2026.

item.title: Adieu Google Assistant : Gemini s’invite dans 250 millions de voitures, et vous pouvez (presque) tout lui demander
item.description: Google active la plus grande bascule logicielle jamais opérée dans l'automobile. Son assistant IA Gemini remplace progressivement Google Assistant sur Android Auto, et la firme revendique déjà plus de 250 millions de véhicules compatibles. Une montée en puissance massive, qui s'accompagne quand même de quelques zones d'ombre.

item.title: Gemini débarque partout sur Android : comment Google va vous aider à automatiser votre quotidien
item.description: Google a annoncé le déploiement de plusieurs fonctionnalités de Gemini Intelligence sur Android pour automatiser certaines tâches directement sur vos appareils. Réserver des vacances, prendre un rendez-vous depuis Chrome, remplir un formulaire : l’IA sera bientôt capable de faire ces actions à votre place. De plus, une nouvelle fonctionnalité va vous permettre de transformer vos pensées fragmentées en textes structurés...

item.title: Everything Google announced at its Android Show, from Googlebooks to vibe-coded widgets
item.description: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.

item.title: Google Maps fait sa plus grande révolution depuis 10 ans : des changements bluffants, mais une mauvaise nouvelle pour la France
item.description: Google présente la refonte la plus profonde de Maps depuis plus d'une décennie selon les dires de la marque. Au menu : navigation en 3D, voix plus naturelle, recommandations conversationnelles et compatibilité élargie à la voiture. Mais attention, le déploiement va prendre des mois et tout le monde n'y aura pas droit en même temps.

item.title: Android 17 : Google dévoile les nouveautés de la prochaine mise à jour de votre smartphone
item.description: Google lève le voile sur Android 17 et ses nombreuses nouveautés. Refonte visuelle des émojis, outils d'édition, et nouvelles fonctions pensées pour simplifier le quotidien...Le système d'exploitation fait le plein de fonctionnalités pratiques. On fait le point sur celles-ci.

item.title: Google dévoile le Googlebook, un PC portable sous Android qui enterre le Chromebook
item.description: Les Chromebook avaient leur navigateur. Les Googlebook auront Gemini, le Play Store et vos applications Android. Google vient de présenter sa nouvelle plateforme de PC portables, et les cinq plus grands constructeurs mondiaux sont déjà alignés.

item.title: The Top New Features in Google’s Android 17—and Gemini Intelligence—Coming This Summer
item.description: You’ll soon be able to generate your own widgets or ask Gemini to finish a booking in Chrome on Android.

item.title: Googlebook Is Google’s New AI-Powered Laptop Platform Built on Android
item.description: They won’t replace Chromebooks, but Googlebooks have an Android-centered operating system, AI-first features like the Magic Pointer, and a promise of desktop-grade apps.

item.title: Android Auto is now one (screen) size fits all
item.description: This week at I/O, Google rolled out a series of major updates for Android Auto that include better sizing for unconventionally shaped screens, video streaming through YouTube, widget support, and of course, more AI-powered Gemini features. The company also announced some updates for cars that run on Google's built-in native software, including the ability to […]...

item.title: Google announces its Chromebook successor: the Googlebook
item.description: Google is announcing a new line of laptops coming in the fall called Googlebooks. Details are sparse for now, as the tease is just a small part of various Android announcements during Google's Android Show. But we do know this is a major new initiative in the laptop space for Google, seemingly designed to succeed […]

item.title: The 9 biggest new features in Android 17
item.description: Would it shock you to hear that Android 17 is filled with new AI-enabled features, like improved dictation and vibe-coded widgets? Fortunately, that's not all. The platform is getting non-AI updates too, from an emoji overhaul to a new screentime tool that helps you avoid distracting apps. Google has just revealed the biggest changes coming […]

item.title: Gemini’s latest updates are all about controlling your phone
item.description: It is, once again, Gemini season. Google is announcing a host of new Gemini features during its pre-I/O Android showcase, many of which aim to help use your phone for you. You'll find Gemini in more places, like Chrome on Android, in your autofill suggestions, and all up in your apps - if you want. […]

item.title: The AI legal services industry is heating up. Anthropic is getting in on the action.
item.description: As the AI legal services industry heats up, Anthropic is launching its own suite of features designed to assist law firms.

item.title: Google adds Gemini-powered Dictation to Gboard, which could be bad news for dictation startups
item.description: Google's transcription feature will initially launch with Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones

item.title: Android adds a feature to stop you from doomscrolling
item.description: Google’s new Android feature, Pause Point, forces you to wait before opening distracting apps in an effort to curb addictive scrolling habits.

item.title: Google unveils Googlebooks, a new line of AI-native laptops
item.description: The company says Googlebooks, which are launching this fall, are the first laptops designed from the ground up for Gemini Intelligence to offer personal and proactive help.

item.title: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe code your own widgets
item.description: The new feature will first launch on the latest Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones this summer.

item.title: Google brings agentic AI and vibe-coded widgets to Android
item.description: Gemini Intelligence will also include Gboard based dictation and form filling capabilities

item.title: Google launches new Android security feature to help uncover spyware attacks
item.description: Intrusion Logging is a new part of Android’s Advanced Protection Mode, which aims to help protect human rights activists, journalists, and dissidents from government spyware attack and law enforcement forensic devices.

item.title: Google just revealed Gemini Intelligence for Android — here are 7 ways it wants your phone to do all the work for you, so you don’t have to
item.description: Gemini Intelligence brings AI-powered automation, smarter browsing, and custom widgets directly into Android.

item.title: Google just delivered its first Gemini-centric platform in Googlebook, and it may feature the first AI OS
item.description: Google is finally ready to combine Android and Chrome OS into one platform on a new line of classy Googlebooks

item.title: 7 best Android 17 upgrades announced at The Android Show — from 3D emojis to Screen Reactions
item.description: The Android Show 2026 contained numerous major Android 17 announcements — these are the seven biggest upcoming features.

item.title: Google announces upcoming security tools for Android, including enhanced protection against banking scam calls
item.description: The Live Threat Detection feature is also getting a major upgrade.

item.title: Googlebooks are the Android-based evolution of the Chromebook
item.description: Google's only giving us a tease of what it has planned for its new laptop lineup.

item.title: Instagram's in-app camera will support Ultra HDR and Night Sight on Android
item.description: Meta is also finally delivering an Instagram app for Android tablets.

item.title: Gemini in Chrome arrives on Android devices in June
item.description: A device with at least 4GB of RAM is required to use the software.

item.title: Gemini Intelligence brings app automation to Android
item.description: It will arrive on Pixel and Samsung Galaxy phones first.

item.title: Android 17 includes better iOS file sharing and a forced break for addictive apps
item.description: Google is also launching 3D Emoji.

item.title: Android Auto is getting a big makeover for 2026
item.description: Upgrades include a revamped UI, support for widgets, immersive 3D maps and more.

item.title: The biggest announcements from The Android Show: I/O Edition
item.description: Google held The Android Show in advance of I/O again this year, revealing Googlebook laptops and more.

item.title: Google announces the Googlebook, a new breed of built-for-Gemini laptops
item.description: At an Android event on May 12, Google revealed a new class of Gemini-powered laptops, dubbed Googlebooks.

item.title: « Une réinvention fondamentale » : Google dévoile les Googlebook, sa nouvelle vision du PC portable sous Android
item.description: Toujours dans son objectif de « réinventer l'ordinateur portable », Google présente les Googlebook, une nouvelle gamme de PC portables propulsés par les dernières technologies de son IA Gemini.

item.title: Marre de scroller sans réfléchir ? Cette nouvelle option va vous imposer 10 secondes de réflexion
item.description: La fonction Pause Point vise à limiter l'usage compulsif des écrans en imposant une pause de réflexion de 10 secondes avant d'ouvrir une application.

item.title: AirDrop sur Android : Google déploie enfin la fonction que tous les utilisateurs attendaient
item.description: La compatibilité native de Quick Share avec AirDrop s'étend à de nombreux appareils Android. Entre transferts via QR Code et intégration dans WhatsApp, Google joue son va-tout pour imposer son standard.
